name: Keep
description: Open-source AIOps alert management platform that aggregates, dedupes and correlates alerts from 50+ observability tools.

seo.title: Keep — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Keep: Open-source AIOps alert management platform that aggregates, dedupes and correlates alerts from 50+ observability tools.

when_to_use: Aggregate and deduplicate alerts from 50+ tools
AIOps correlation of related alerts across systems
Open-source alert management with Slack and PagerDuty
Rule-based alert routing and suppression policies

pros: Alert deduplication and correlation in one layer
Alternative to PagerDuty AIOps at lower cost
cons: Self-host operational burden for small teams
review.verdict: Promising open-source alert brain that deserves a pilot, but not yet a drop-in PagerDuty replacement.
review.best_for: Platform teams wanting open alternative to PagerDuty AIOps or BigPanda.
review.not_for: Teams needing battle-tested AIOps with dedicated 24/7 support.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
